zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir, Anthony Andrews , I於1342年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Ralph Andrews III26歲，母親Lady, Anne Swinborne20歲。他於大約1370年與Lady, Anne Thurston在英國越可爾曼諾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在英國英格蘭越可爾貝弗利享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir, Anthony Andrews , I于1342年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Ralph Andrews III26岁，母亲Lady, Anne Swinborne20岁。他于大约1370年与Lady, Anne Thurston在英国越可爾曼諾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年在英国英格兰越可爾貝弗利享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir, Anthony Andrews , I was born in 1342, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Andrews III, was 26 and his mother, Lady, Anne Swinborne, was 20. He married Lady, Anne Thurston about 1370, in Manor, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1400, in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir, Anthony Andrews , I est né en 1342, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Andrews III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady, Anne Swinborne, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady, Anne Thurston environ 1370, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1400, à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir, Anthony Andrews , I 1342 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Andrews III 26 und seine Mutter Lady, Anne Swinborne 20. Er hat um 1370 in Manor, Yorkshire, England Lady, Anne Thurston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir, Anthony Andrews , I è nato il nel 1342 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Andrews III, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady, Anne Swinborne, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady, Anne Thurston circa 1370, nel Manor, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1400, nel Beverley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir, Anthony Andrews , Iが1342年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph Andrews IIIは26歳，母Lady, Anne Swinborneは20歳であった。約1370年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーでLady, Anne Thurstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir, Anthony Andrews , I(이)가 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Andrews III(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady, Anne Swinborne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국 요르크실르 먼어에서 Lady, Anne Thurston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 베벌리에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir, Anthony Andrews , I nasceu em 1342, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Andrews III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady, Anne Swinborne, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady, Anne Thurston aproximadamente 1370, em Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1400, em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir, Anthony Andrews , I родился в 1342 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Andrews III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady, Anne Swinborne, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady, Anne Thurston около 1370 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1400 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir, Anthony Andrews , I nació en 1342, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Andrews III, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady, Anne Swinborne, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady, Anne Thurston aproximadamente 1370, en Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1400, en Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
